unresolved_requirements: Find repeatable natural or transformed structured-corpus seed-span wins.
Test whether context/residual transforms and periodic masks work better when composed.
Enumerate the full depth-3 frontier on frozen depth-2 null/frontier rows before considering depth 4.
Run bounded depth-4 pilot shards as generated evidence before considering full depth-4 execution.
Execute the top-ranked seed-table/Lotus preset evidence probe.
Execute the exact short-hit bundle economics evidence probe.
Execute the whole-stream residual-vector falsification probe.
Execute the expander salt/preset ensemble falsification probe.
Replicate and harden the schema-native public dictionary result on frozen expansion corpora.
Gate broad long-span bundle sweeps before spending compute.
Gate recursive v2 claims against ordinary structured fixtures, not planted offsets.
Test whether residual fifth-byte masks make prefix ladders survive held-out data.
Test whether context-conditioned fifth-byte masks beat same-shape null controls.
Test bounded structural reversible transforms across held-out, shadow, and binary controls.
Test finite seed-output byte-distribution alignment with reversible global and phase-local byte permutations.
Test bounded BWT/MTF/RLE classic preconditioners without counting transform-only shortening as Lotus evidence.
Test reversible grammar/channel streams with literal sidecars charged before promotion.
Test parsed numeric value streams with exact reconstruction metadata charged before promotion.
Test record/context-aware reversible transforms with metadata charged before promotion.
Test token/dictionary reversible transforms with dictionary metadata charged before promotion.
Test reversible affine byte remaps as a stronger alphabet-alignment preconditioner.
Test whether forced exact seed spans plus residual sidecar bytes beat literal storage.
Replicate packed sidecar descriptor evidence on predeclared unrelated held-out corpora.
Run pre-sidecar exact match discovery across validation and replication corpora.
Test whether the match-discovery null result is caused by block alignment, phase, or arity policy.
Run exact seed-span discovery after the frozen reversible transform-validation matrix.
Run exact seed-span discovery over selected affine, periodic, and composed transform leads.

entries.requirement: Define what Telomere is now, what Lotus means here, and what is explicitly gone.
entries.finding: The active architecture separates stable v1, experimental v2, and removed gloss/bloom/fuzz/hash-table stubs.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep doc lint rejecting stale claims and removed components.

entries.requirement: Replace README with a current user guide and make FORMAT.md the source of truth.
entries.finding: The README documents real CLI flags, limits, and honest performance tiers; FORMAT.md owns v1/v2 wire contracts.
entries.remaining_gate: Update both when the CLI or wire format changes.

entries.requirement: Decide and implement the header strategy for hasher kind, Lotus preset/version, layer count, lengths, and hash.
entries.finding: v1 uses a variable-length Lotus bit-stream header (J3D2 for general fields, J1D1 for arity) written after a 5-byte raw TLMR magic + version prefix, and the selected hasher is authoritative during decompression.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not emit recursive v1 output; use v2 for recursive layers.

entries.requirement: Reject or formally support non-byte-aligned seed payloads.
entries.finding: v1 records carry a Lotus J1D1 arity discriminator and (for compressed records) a Lotus J3D2 bit-aligned seed index; literal records pad to a byte boundary before their raw block bytes. Invalid or truncated payloads are rejected.
entries.remaining_gate: Any change to the bit-stream layout needs a new format version and golden vectors.

entries.requirement: Keep v1 stable and make v2 explicit experimental indexed/multi-layer format.
entries.finding: v2 has recursive layer descriptors, seed-span records, literal records, hasher metadata, and index-free decode.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat v2 compatibility as experimental until a release checklist promotes it.

entries.requirement: Fix multi-pass semantics so decompression is unambiguous.
entries.finding: v1 emits one-layer-decodable output; v2 records layer descriptors for recursive decode without an index.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not add recursive superposition; selected layers only.

entries.requirement: Ensure reported final_bytes always matches bytes actually written.
entries.finding: Run summaries and CLI JSON report the encoded buffer length after the engine returns bytes.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep CLI JSON tests tied to output file sizes.

entries.requirement: Restore arity 2 and add compressor-level regression coverage.
entries.finding: Lotus arity 2 is valid and the generated planted arity-2 result remains negative delta.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep arity 2 out of reserved-marker space forever.

entries.requirement: Validate block_size, max_seed_len, max_arity, hash_bits, and memory limits.
entries.finding: Runtime and v2 search configs reject invalid sizes, hash bits, span lengths, and span-step settings.
entries.remaining_gate: Add regression tests with every new tuning knob.

entries.requirement: Remove slow default tests, broken fuzz targets, gloss/bloom stubs, disabled binaries, and junk artifacts.
entries.finding: The supported bin list is explicit, fuzz/hash-dump stubs are gone, gloss/bloom are removed or archived as absent, and logs/caches are ignored.
entries.remaining_gate: Run doc lint and git status review before release.

entries.requirement: Decide GPU fate and keep the selected path buildable with parity tests.
entries.finding: GPU status is research-only-cpu-semantics; the feature must compile, but no production kernel is claimed.
entries.remaining_gate: Promote only after a real kernel beats CPU streaming under parity and benchmark gates.

entries.requirement: Add index build/info/verify and engine/format dispatch while preserving v1 defaults.
entries.finding: CLI supports index build/info/verify, brute v1 default, indexed/streaming v2 opt-in, --json, --verify, --hasher, --memory-limit, --force, and v2 auto-decode.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep v1 compatibility defaults unless the user explicitly selects v2 engines.

entries.requirement: Build exact generated-prefix seed indexing with reusable/mmap tier backends.
entries.finding: The index records generated prefixes by tier, verifies hits by regenerating exact bytes, and rejects stale/cross-hasher manifests.
entries.remaining_gate: Scale index build memory and IO only after the streaming CPU path identifies valuable workloads.

entries.requirement: Build stratified target span tables and seed-streaming lookup.
entries.finding: The streaming matcher groups raw target spans by tier, enumerates seeds once, checks generated prefixes across tiers, and verifies exact bytes before candidate emission.
entries.remaining_gate: Extend only with evidence-driven transforms or better tier policies.

entries.requirement: Replace lightweight pruning with deterministic candidate lattice and weighted non-overlap selection.
entries.finding: Selected records collapse to ordinary v2 seed-span/literal records; decompression never needs candidate state.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep superposition as telemetry and selection, not recursive format state.

entries.requirement: Wire the Tauri app to real indexed/v2/index-building workflows.
entries.finding: The Tauri host exposes real index, compress, decompress, telemetry, and research-artifact summary commands; UI workflow smoke covers 87 evidence keys with 0 missing Tauri fields and 0 missing mock fields.
entries.remaining_gate: Add live desktop/browser smoke coverage before calling the UI production-ready.

entries.requirement: Create generated benchmark/result scripts and honest results docs.
entries.finding: Results are generated from CLI/engine runs and include planted, random, structured, binary, Kolyma, indexed, streaming, and recursive controls.
entries.remaining_gate: Never hand-edit benchmark claims; regenerate artifacts.

entries.requirement: Add deterministic planted corpus proving the mechanism can produce negative delta.
entries.finding: Planted v1 arity2, indexed span8, and streaming span8 cases prove the mechanism when data contains generated spans.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not generalize planted wins to natural corpora.

entries.requirement: Remove stale claims that random controls are expected to shrink.
entries.finding: Random controls are expected to bloat; doc lint rejects the stale random-compression claim.
entries.remaining_gate: Investigate any future random negative delta as suspicious until reproduced.

entries.requirement: Find repeatable natural or transformed structured-corpus seed-span wins.
entries.finding: Current held-out validation has prefix>=4 uplift in 11 corpora but 0 held-out exact hits; corpus generalization controls found 0 prefix>=5 rows and 0 exact hits; composed context+periodic probes have 0 held-out prefix>=5 uplift corpora and 0 exact hits.
entries.remaining_gate: Promote only after repeatable prefix>=5 uplift or exact seed-span hits on held-out data.

entries.requirement: Audit deterministic replication corpora before mutating the expensive corpus matrix.
entries.finding: 20 frozen replication corpora (13 ordinary, 7 controls) are missing from both the corpus matrix and transform validation. The raw expansion scanned 680395 spans and found 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact-hit rows, and 0 selected-span rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Promote these corpora into the canonical matrices only after a follow-up changes prefix>=5, exact-hit, or selected-span evidence.

entries.requirement: Test whether context/residual transforms and periodic masks work better when composed.
entries.finding: 525 compositions selected 33 discovery leads; held-out prefix>=5 uplift 0 corpora and exact hits 0.
entries.remaining_gate: Reject composition as a promotion path unless it produces held-out prefix>=5 or exact seed-span events.

entries.requirement: Model whether deeper search is compute-justified.
entries.finding: Best non-planted case http-headers-heldout::sub-lag-2 needs about 8.280e+02 GiB for one expected exact hit; held-out prefix>=5 rows remain 0 at depth 2. The depth-3 prefix probe found 3 held-out prefix>=5 uplift rows and 0 exact hits; the bounded compression follow-up found 0 selected spans. The selected-lead follow-up found 0 selected spans, and frontier exact discovery found 0 exact hits.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not spend on depth-3+ broad sweeps until a narrow follow-up turns prefix movement into exact hits or compression.

entries.requirement: Test whether searching farther moves held-out near misses beyond the fifth-byte gate.
entries.finding: 16843008 depth-3 seeds were enumerated; 3 held-out rows gained prefix>=5 movement, but exact 8-byte hits remain 0. The compression follow-up deduped this to 2 physical input and found 0 selected spans.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep broad depth-3 sweeps gated until a new lead produces exact hits or selected spans.

entries.requirement: Enumerate the full depth-3 frontier on frozen depth-2 null/frontier rows before considering depth 4.
entries.finding: Lead depth-3 prefix probe found 2 prefix>=5 uplift rows; the lead compression follow-up selected 0 spans. Frontier exact discovery enumerated 16843008 seeds over 26 rows and found 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 metadata-profitable rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep depth 4 opt-in and sharded until this gate finds prefix>=6 movement, exact hits, or selected spans.

entries.requirement: Plan depth-4 as explicit deterministic shards with expected-hit math and stop rules.
entries.finding: Depth-4 shard status is gated; estimated full incremental depth-4 time is 7.5975 hours; exact-8 probability on the current frontier is 0.00017141.
entries.remaining_gate: Run only pilot shards until the promotion gate is met by stronger depth-3, transform, or corpus evidence.

entries.requirement: Run bounded depth-4 pilot shards as generated evidence before considering full depth-4 execution.
entries.finding: 1 pilot shard enumerated 16777216 four-byte seeds; prefix>=5 rows 0; prefix>=6 rows 0; exact hits 0; selected spans 0.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep remaining depth-4 shards gated unless a pilot or upstream lead produces prefix>=6, exact hits, or selected spans.

entries.requirement: Create a generated go/no-go gate before broad raw depth search or full depth-4 execution.
entries.finding: Search gate status is hold-broad-depth-search; best non-planted forecast is 828.0 GiB per expected exact hit; depth-4 exact-8 probability is 0.00017141; selected span total is 0; 7 of 7 gates remain blocking.
entries.remaining_gate: Change this gate only when a generated artifact produces prefix>=6, exact hits, selected spans, or a materially better forecast.

entries.requirement: Rank the next non-depth mechanism experiments from generated evidence.
entries.finding: Mechanism experiment ranking top lane is seed-table-preset-probe; next artifact docs/SEED_TABLE_PRESET_PROBE.md; ready lanes 7; selected spans 0; natural-corpus compression proven False.
entries.remaining_gate: Generate the seed-table preset probe before raw-depth escalation, format promotion, descriptor packing, or hardware acceleration.

entries.requirement: Execute the top-ranked seed-table/Lotus preset evidence probe.
entries.finding: Seed-table preset probe selected 37768 canonical spans; ordinary held-out negative groups 0; control negative groups 0; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not promote a public Lotus preset unless ordinary held-out negative groups reach the gate and controls remain null.

entries.requirement: Execute the exact short-hit bundle economics evidence probe.
entries.finding: Exact short-hit bundle economics reconstructed 3480 verified hits; zero-overhead best delta -1410 bytes; full-stream negative rows 6; ordinary negative groups 3; control negative groups 1; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not promote span-3 hit bundling unless full-stream wins survive unrelated ordinary groups with null controls and non-comparable control density.

entries.requirement: Execute the whole-stream residual-vector falsification probe.
entries.finding: Whole-stream residual vector probe encoded 2358 honest rows; exact decode rows 2358; honest full-stream negative rows 0; ordinary held-out negative groups 0; control negative groups 0; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not continue residual-sidecar promotion unless whole-stream vector rows produce unrelated ordinary held-out wins with controls null.

entries.requirement: Execute the expander salt/preset ensemble falsification probe.
entries.finding: Expander salt ensemble tested 16 predeclared salts; salted exact hits 0; salted expected exact hits 0.648961; random-trial multiplier exceeded False; selected-span rows 0; full-stream negative rows 0; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not promote salted expanders unless they beat equivalent random trials and create full-stream ordinary held-out wins with null controls.

entries.requirement: Execute the schema-native public dictionary preset probe.
entries.finding: Schema-native public dictionaries used 101 frozen entries; family selected spans 11302; ordinary held-out negative groups 14; family control negative groups 0; wrong-schema negative groups 0; same-size random negative groups 0; shadow negative groups 0; promotion met True.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat this as public dictionary-preset evidence only until a format registry, compatibility rule, and non-synthetic replication path exist.

entries.requirement: Replicate and harden the schema-native public dictionary result on frozen expansion corpora.
entries.finding: Replication used 20 frozen corpora; standards selected spans 20239; ordinary negative groups 9; standards control negative groups 2; generic ordinary negative groups 2; claim level control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not promote a public dictionary registry or format-level support until paired shadow controls and external corpora separate cleanly.

entries.requirement: Generate deterministic candidate-lattice telemetry with explained discarded candidates.
entries.finding: Superposition telemetry used 4 fixtures and 13 candidates; retained alternatives 2; weighted extra savings 4; weighted-beats-greedy fixtures 1; unexplained discards 0; promotion met True.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep the lattice decoder-invisible; this is selector telemetry, not recursive format state.

entries.requirement: Gate broad long-span bundle sweeps before spending compute.
entries.finding: Long-span bundle gate met 0 of 8 checks; recommendation hold_long_span_bundle_sweeps; selected spans 0; raw-suffix prefix 4/6; claim level long_span_bundle_gate_blocked_by_evidence.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps until the generated gate passes.

entries.requirement: Gate recursive v2 claims against ordinary structured fixtures, not planted offsets.
entries.finding: Recursive structured fixtures used 5 CLI-verified fixtures; ordinary later-win families 0; planted offset later-win families 0; first-pass control win families 1; all decoded exactly True; claim level recursive_structured_fixtures_not_promoted; promotion met False.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not generalize recursive v2 gains unless ordinary non-offset fixtures produce verified later-layer container wins.

entries.requirement: Test whether residual fifth-byte masks make prefix ladders survive held-out data.
entries.finding: 20 residual masks produced 0 cross-corpus prefix>=5 win rows and 0 exact-hit rows; contextual steering checked 16 masks and produced 0 cross-corpus prefix>=5 win rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Reject residual masks unless they generalize into prefix>=5 or exact hits.

entries.requirement: Test whether context-conditioned fifth-byte masks beat same-shape null controls.
entries.finding: 16 contextual masks were checked over 320 held-out cross rows; prefix>=5 win rows 0, exact-hit rows 0, null prefix>=5 win rows 0.
entries.remaining_gate: Reject contextual steering as a promotion path unless it beats null controls on held-out prefix>=5 or exact hits.

entries.requirement: Test bounded structural reversible transforms across held-out, shadow, and binary controls.
entries.finding: 30 structural candidates over 660 validation rows produced 0 held-out prefix>=5 win corpora, 0 held-out exact hits, 0 shadow prefix>=5 win corpora, and 0 binary exact hits.
entries.remaining_gate: Keep format-transform and broad depth work gated until structural or successor transforms produce repeatable promotion signals.

entries.requirement: Test finite seed-output byte-distribution alignment with reversible global and phase-local byte permutations.
entries.finding: 7 byte-permutation candidates over 154 rows produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat byte-distribution alignment as null until it produces prefix>=5, exact hits, or metadata-profitable selected spans.

entries.requirement: Test bounded BWT/MTF/RLE classic preconditioners without counting transform-only shortening as Lotus evidence.
entries.finding: 9 BWT/MTF/RLE candidates over 90 rows produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, 0 rows negative after metadata, and 6 shorter transformed-payload rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat BWT/MTF/RLE as null seed-span evidence unless it produces prefix>=5, exact hits, or metadata-profitable selected spans.

entries.requirement: Test reversible grammar/channel streams with literal sidecars charged before promotion.
entries.finding: 9 grammar channels over 198 rows produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat grammar-channel sidecar models as null until a parser-backed channel survives held-out/control promotion.

entries.requirement: Test parsed numeric value streams with exact reconstruction metadata charged before promotion.
entries.finding: 7 numeric value channels over 98 rows parsed 120214 values and produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat parsed numeric value channels as null until exact seed spans survive full reconstruction metadata.

entries.requirement: Test record/context-aware reversible transforms with metadata charged before promotion.
entries.finding: 14 record/context candidates over 84 rows produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat the current record-context lane as null until exact seed spans appear after metadata.

entries.requirement: Test token/dictionary reversible transforms with dictionary metadata charged before promotion.
entries.finding: 9 token/dictionary candidates over 126 rows produced 0 prefix>=5 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 rows negative after metadata.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat the current token-dictionary lane as null until exact seed spans appear after metadata.

entries.requirement: Test reversible affine byte remaps as a stronger alphabet-alignment preconditioner.
entries.finding: 7937 affine candidates produced 16 held-out prefix>=4 win corpora, but 0 held-out prefix>=5 win corpora and 0 held-out exact hits.
entries.remaining_gate: Treat prefix-4 movement as a steering clue only; require residual-sidecar savings, prefix>=5, or exact hits before depth escalation.

entries.requirement: Test whether forced exact seed spans plus residual sidecar bytes beat literal storage.
entries.finding: 31 held-out rows had forced exact spans, 31 had positive seed contribution, but 0 held-out rows had negative net delta; best held-out net delta was 5 bytes.
entries.remaining_gate: Do not promote residual steering until sidecar bytes plus metadata beat literal storage on held-out corpora.

entries.requirement: Derive longer-span sidecar break-even rules before spending on more residual steering variants.
entries.finding: 648 break-even rows show raw-suffix strict gain starts at prefix 6 while current held-out forced prefixes stop at 4; raw-suffix viable rows at observed prefix 0 and sublinear-model viable rows 23.
entries.remaining_gate: Measure actual residual payload compressibility before promoting any sidecar format or engine variant.

entries.requirement: Measure whether selected residual suffix bytes can be compressed enough to beat sidecar overhead.
entries.finding: 31 held-out payload rows include 1 measured negative sidecar row; best case rust-like-heldout::affine-a003-b211::prefix4-suffix-xor.
entries.remaining_gate: Prototype exact experimental descriptor decode for the zlib/LZMA signal before any format support claim.

entries.requirement: Prototype exact decode and corrupt rejection for the promoted residual payload sidecar signal.
entries.finding: 2 descriptor rows decode and reject corruption; full-stream negative rows 0 and best full-stream delta 596 bytes.
entries.remaining_gate: Reduce record/literal overhead or find larger span bundles before revisiting sidecar format support.

entries.requirement: Budget lower-overhead sidecar record layouts for the promoted residual payload signal.
entries.finding: 6 budget rows go negative; best safe layout delta_offset_u8_seed_u16 reaches -489 bytes.
entries.remaining_gate: Build an exact packed-table decoder prototype before treating the budget as compression evidence.

entries.requirement: Prototype a packed offset/seed-index residual sidecar descriptor with exact decode proof.
entries.finding: 2 packed rows are full-stream negative; best coder zlib_level9 reaches -485 bytes.
entries.remaining_gate: Replicate on controls and additional held-out corpora before changing `.tlmr`.

entries.requirement: Run packed sidecar descriptor controls across selected discovery, held-out, shadow, and binary rows.
entries.finding: 4 unique cases go negative, including 1 ordinary held-out case; most selected rows are skipped by strict packed-table assumptions.
entries.remaining_gate: Generalize packed encodability before treating this as broad compression evidence.

entries.requirement: Generalize packed sidecar descriptors across wider offset and seed modes.
entries.finding: 48 unique source rows encode, but ordinary held-out negative cases remain 1; best-supported table bytes are 2842 versus baseline 6872.
entries.remaining_gate: Run frozen replication before proposing format changes.

entries.requirement: Replicate packed sidecar descriptor evidence on predeclared unrelated held-out corpora.
entries.finding: 520 source cases and 6240 descriptor rows produced 0 full-stream negative rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Find new independent match-discovery leads before more descriptor packing work.

entries.requirement: Run pre-sidecar exact match discovery across validation and replication corpora.
entries.finding: 11154720 target spans across 1050 rows produced 0 exact-hit rows and 0 selected spans.
entries.remaining_gate: Change match-discovery strategy before returning to sidecar packing or format work.

entries.requirement: Test whether the match-discovery null result is caused by block alignment, phase, or arity policy.
entries.finding: 25210986 target spans across 2134 rows produced 3480 exact hits, 0 positive exact hits, and 0 selected spans.
entries.remaining_gate: Find profitable exact hits or prefix>=5 movement before spending more on alignment-only tuning.

entries.requirement: Run exact seed-span discovery after the frozen reversible transform-validation matrix.
entries.finding: 16494870 transformed target spans across 693 rows produced 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 metadata-profitable rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Find a new transform family or deeper seed lane before promoting transform metadata.

entries.requirement: Run exact seed-span discovery over selected affine, periodic, and composed transform leads.
entries.finding: 71477770 selected-lead target spans across 3003 rows produced 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans, and 0 metadata-profitable rows.
entries.remaining_gate: Stop broadening selected prefix-4 leads until a new family or deeper seed lane crosses prefix>=5 or exact-hit thresholds.

entries.requirement: Avoid unsupported recursive convergence claims while testing recursive v2 mechanics.
entries.finding: Recursive v2 mechanics are implemented and planted recursive controls work, but compounding natural-corpus gains are not proved.
entries.remaining_gate: Promote recursive research only after selected spans appear outside planted controls.

entries.requirement: Scale planted-density sweeps for runtime and memory evidence.
entries.finding: Current scale evidence reaches the generated 16 MiB planted-density sweep; the scale report finds peak memory 1934.602 MiB, peak/table ratio 21.985, and next-double peak estimate 3869.204 MiB.
entries.remaining_gate: Extend bounded scale rows only after memory telemetry or chunked target tables explain and reduce the working set.

entries.requirement: Add CI and production release checklist.
entries.finding: Release docs define supported format versions, compatibility guarantees, gates, known limitations, and migration rules.
entries.remaining_gate: Run the full release gate set before tagging.
